title: Daren Farmer
compiled_truth: Daren Farmer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-05-23), Daren Farmer sent 1502 and received 2347 emails, totalling 3849 interactions. Top correspondents: [Aimee Lannou](people/aimee-lannou) (140), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (122), [Megan Parker](people/megan-parker) (108), [Jackie Young](people/jackie-young) (84), [Tom Acton](people/tom-acton) (82).
